expectations.evidence: Summary table at end; structured sections 1–3.

expectations.text: Bundle definition includes lip liner + lipstick + lip gloss with a name like 'Complete Lip Look' or equivalent
expectations.evidence: "Complete Lip Look" or "Complete Lip Look Bundle"; liner + lipstick + gloss.

expectations.text: Output includes CTA phrasing for adding the full set (e.g. 'Add complete lip look to cart') and secondary option to add single item only
expectations.evidence: Primary: 'Add Complete Lip Look to cart'; supporting 'Liner + lipstick + gloss in one click'.

expectations.text: Output specifies PDP placement and mentions WooCommerce or is applicable to WooCommerce
expectations.evidence: Single product pages, cart, category; 'Implement the bundle as a WooCommerce product (grouped or composite)'.

expectations.text: Output includes AOV, attach rate, and/or conversion as metrics
expectations.evidence: No explicit AOV/attach rate/conversion metrics section; focus on naming, placement, CTA phrasing.
